new_order.physician_note: Patient tolerated liquid diet well. Bowel sounds present. Progress to soft mechanical diet. No raw vegetables. No seeds. All food must be well-cooked and easily mashable. Re-evaluate on Day 7 for regular diet.

revision_summary: Diet upgraded from clear liquid to soft mechanical. Calorie target increased by 400 kcal/day. 7 ingredients now unlocked from inventory. Kitchen to update tray from Day 4 breakfast onwards.
